summary: Solid, high‑tempo performance with a crisp Jack Straw intro; recording quality not specifically noted
review: The reviewer finds this show solid, highlighting the energetic East‑Coast feel and a memorable intro before “Jack Straw.” While they compare it to the benchmark 10/18/83 and call it less spirited, there is no detailed comment on the audio source or fidelity. Overall the impression is mildly positive but limited in scope.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single brief review; reviewer gives modest praise for the performance but offers no concrete recording assessment, leading to an average rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard or audience source; only a vague reference to “crisp” in the title, insufficient to judge technical quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as high‑tempo with East‑Coast energy; solid version but not particularly spirited according to the reviewer.
